notes: France are near full strength — Saliba, Koundé, and Tchouameni all cleared minor injury concerns, with only Hugo Ekitike confirmed absent long-term; Deschamps expected to field his strongest XI with no rotation hints. Senegal receive a major boost with Koulibaly cleared to play, and Mané, Jackson, and Sarr all available, giving Thiaw a full-strength attacking lineup.
home_scorers: Kylian Mbappé (leading striker, on penalties, World Cup pedigree)
Ousmane Dembélé (wide attacker, Champions League form, set-piece threat)
Michael Olise (dynamic wide forward, goals and assists from midfield line)
away_scorers: Sadio Mané (all-time top scorer, talisman, left wing/second striker)
Nicolas Jackson (centre-forward, Bayern Munich form, direct runner)
Ismaila Sarr (pacey wide attacker, Crystal Palace, dangerous in transition)
